title: ceratophyllum demersum var. laeve
intro: Ceratophyllum demersum var. laeve, also known as smooth coontail, is a submerged aquatic plant species belonging to the family Ceratophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ceratophyllum demersum var. laeve include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its herbal preparations are also used in topical creams and ointments to treat various skin conditions.
